name: Spring Thaw
description: Frozen landscape cracking and melting to life

simple: frozen landscape cracking and melting awake with spring thaw
standard: frozen landscape cracking and melting awake with spring thaw
ice breaking on river with flowing water rushing beneath
winter silence yielding to trickling streams and dripping icicles
detailed: frozen landscape cracking and melting awake with spring thaw
